productDisplayName: DKNY Women White Dial Chronograph Watch NY4331
description: Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel Stainless steel strap with a butterfly clasp Mother of pearl dial with metallic numbers and hands and crystals to mark the hours Screw and two buttons to reset time, alarm and set the timer DKNY branding on the dial 3 chronograph displays Date aperture at the 3-hour mark Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water-resistance up to 50 metres allowing you to use it even when showering or bathing but not swimming or divingWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
